## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve, or what RFC discussion does it implement?

## Spec impact

- [ ] No spec changes (docs, examples, tests only)
- [ ] Backward-compatible spec addition (bumps minor version)
- [ ] Breaking spec change (bumps major version, requires RFC discussion link below)

RFC discussion: <link if applicable>

## Checks

- [ ] `SPEC.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No reference to the hosted product internals (those live in a private repo)
